zh.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Tolls於大約1630年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州時，他的父親Daniel Tolles27歲，母親Mrs Daniel Tolles27歲。他於大約1668年與Sarah Narna Mousall在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1699年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可享年70歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Tolls于大约1630年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州时，他的父亲Daniel Tolles27岁，母亲Mrs Daniel Tolles27岁。他于大约1668年与Sarah Narna Mousall在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1699年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可享年70岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文。

nameMeanings.name: Tolls
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Rowles
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and Oxfordshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Roll with genitive or post-medieval excrescent -s. See Rolfe .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.description: On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Tolls was born about 1630, in Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Daniel Tolles, was 27 and his mother, Mrs Daniel Tolles, was 27. He married Sarah Narna Mousall about 1668, in Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1699, in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 70, and was buried in New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Tolls est né environ 1630, à Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Daniel Tolles, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs Daniel Tolles, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Narna Mousall environ 1668, à Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1699, à Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

Er starb 1699 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

Lui sposato Sarah Narna Mousall circa 1668, nel Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ja.lifeSummary: Henry Tollsが約1630年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州で生まれた時，父Daniel Tollesは27歳，母Mrs Daniel Tollesは27歳であった。約1668年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州でSarah Narna Mousallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1699年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンサイブルークで70歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Tolls(이)가 대략 1630년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Daniel Tolles(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Daniel Tolles(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1668년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주에서 Sarah Narna Mousall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1699년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 지브룩에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Tolls nasceu aproximadamente 1630, em Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Daniel Tolles, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Daniel Tolles, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Narna Mousall aproximadamente 1668, em Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1699, em Saybrook, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Tolls родился около 1630 г. в местности Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Daniel Tolles было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Daniel Tolles, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Narna Mousall около 1668 г. в местности Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1699 г. в местности сеибрук, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Tolls nació aproximadamente 1630, en Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Daniel Tolles, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mrs Daniel Tolles, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sarah Narna Mousall aproximadamente 1668, en Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1699, en Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
